turns.question: Thank you again for your time, it was a pleasure.
turns.answer: The pleasure was all mine, thank you for coming.

turns.question: I look forward to working together going forward.
turns.answer: As do I, I'll be in touch soon.

turns.question: Thank you for meeting with us today, safe travels.
turns.answer: Thank you, I appreciate the hospitality.

turns.question: It was wonderful to finally meet you in person.
turns.answer: Likewise, I hope we can do this again soon.

turns.question: I'll follow up with you by email tomorrow.
turns.answer: Perfect, I'll keep an eye out for it.

turns.question: Thank you for your time today, have a safe trip home.
turns.answer: Thank you, I will, and thank you for hosting.

turns.question: It's been a pleasure discussing this with you.
turns.answer: Likewise, I'm glad we had the chance to talk.

turns.question: I hope to see you again at the next conference.
turns.answer: I hope so too, take care until then.

turns.question: Thank you for your hospitality during our stay.
turns.answer: It was truly our pleasure, safe travels back.

turns.question: I'll be in touch regarding the next steps.
turns.answer: Sounds good, I'll be waiting to hear from you.

turns.question: Thank you for taking the time to see us out.
turns.answer: Of course, please have a safe journey home.

turns.question: It was a pleasure putting a face to the name.
turns.answer: Likewise, I look forward to our next meeting.

turns.question: I appreciate everything you've done for us today.
turns.answer: It was truly our pleasure, take care.

turns.question: Thank you again, I hope the rest of your trip goes smoothly.
turns.answer: Thank you, and best of luck with the project.

turns.question: I'll send over the documents as soon as I'm back at my desk.
turns.answer: Thank you, I'll look out for them.

turns.question: It was an honor to host you today.
turns.answer: The honor was ours, thank you for everything.

turns.question: I hope our paths cross again soon.
turns.answer: I certainly hope so, take care until then.

turns.question: Thank you for accommodating our schedule today.
turns.answer: Not a problem at all, safe travels.

turns.question: I'll be sure to pass along your regards.
turns.answer: Thank you, please do, and take care.

turns.question: It's been a genuine pleasure working with your team.
turns.answer: The feeling is mutual, we look forward to more.

turns.question: Please give my best to the rest of your colleagues.
turns.answer: I certainly will, thank you for everything.

turns.question: Thank you again for everything, take care of yourself.
turns.answer: You too, and thank you for the wonderful visit.

turns.question: I hope to have the pleasure of working with you again.
turns.answer: As do I, thank you for a great experience.

turns.question: Thank you for your understanding regarding the delay.
turns.answer: Not a problem at all, thank you for letting us know.

turns.question: It was truly a pleasure meeting you today.

turns.answer: Likewise, I'll follow up shortly.

turns.question: I hope everything goes smoothly on your end from here.
turns.answer: Thank you, I appreciate that, take care as well.

turns.question: It's been wonderful getting to know you today.
turns.answer: Likewise, I look forward to staying in touch.
